Race #6 of 7 in the 2013 Custom Windows Plus Badger Mod Tour presented by Gandrud Chevrolet Season
Next Race >>>
Badger Mod Tour:2013-06
Held on August 4, 2013 at Outagamie Speedway in Seymour, WI
30 L, 9.99 M, 16.08 KM - Scheduled Distance
